fileConflict.title: File Modified Externally
fileConflict.message: was modified outside of Cascade, but you have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
fileConflict.keepMineDesc: Ignore external changes. You can save to overwrite.
fileConflict.loadExternalDesc: Discard your edits and reload from disk.
fileConflict.saveOverwriteDesc: Overwrite the external changes with yours.
